violations.text: Refrigerator door gasket on the milk case was observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on the milk case was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets at the dairy chest cooler were observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be replaced or repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

Ice buildup observed in the Dairy chest cooler. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Ice buildup shall be broken down to prevent blockage of cold air flow. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

The door to the outside, located in the side entrance, observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen observed very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
